description_long: This object consists of a group of four large, cylindrical metal barrels with a rusted, weathered appearance, arranged on a wooden pallet. The barrels are accompanied by two smaller, white cylindrical containers, also showing signs of wear and some red markings. Behind the barrels, there is a large, slatted wooden barrier and two stacked wooden crates with reinforced corners, all exhibiting a rough, aged texture. The barrels have visible metal banding around their circumference, and the entire set is placed on a circular platform. The scene suggests an industrial or storage setting, with the objects likely used for storing or transporting liquids or materials.
description: A set of four rusted metal barrels on a wooden pallet, flanked by weathered crates, a slatted barrier, and two smaller white containers, all with an industrial, aged look.
description_view_0: Front view showing four rusted barrels on a pallet, two small white containers in front, and crates and a wooden barrier behind.
description_view_1: Rear view dominated by the slatted wooden barrier and stacked crates, with barrels partially visible behind.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the stacked crates, the edge of the wooden barrier, and the barrels on the pallet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the tops of the barrels, pallet surface, and one white container to the right.
